topics.topic_en: Lee Jae-myung Prosecution Dismissal Special Counsel Bill
topics.summary: The ruling Democratic Party is pushing a bill that would allow a special counsel — appointed by President Lee himself — to take over and potentially drop the multiple corruption cases against him. The opposition PPP and legal community have condemned the measure as unconstitutional 'self-acquittal,' and opposition lawmakers rallied outside Cheong Wa Dae to protest.

evidence_headlines.title: '공소취소 특검법'은 중대한 위헌
국힘 "'공소취소 특검'은 죄 지우개 특검…李 침묵, 법안 지시 주체 시인"
Lee urges careful deliberation on special probe over 'fabricated' charges against him under Yoon

topics.topic_en: June 3 Local Elections Campaign and Outlook
topics.summary: With roughly 30 days until the June 3 nationwide local elections, the ruling Democratic Party is heavily favored to sweep at least 15 of 17 metropolitan governorships. The conservative opposition bloc — PPP and Gaehyeok Party — is forming an anti-DP coalition in Seoul and Gyeonggi, rallying around opposition to the special counsel bill and property tax policy.

evidence_headlines.title: 다양한 지방선거 기사 – '조작기소 특검법' 저지 위해 뭉친 수도권 보수 야권 후보들
South Korea's Ruling Party Has a Jung Chung-rae Risk
2026년 6월 지방선거 판세 재편, 권력지도 재편 분수령·3가지 핵심 변수

topics.topic_en: DP Chair Jung Chung-rae Campaign Conduct Controversy
topics.summary: Democratic Party chair Jung Chung-rae sparked a controversy on May 3 when footage showed him prompting an elementary school girl to call a 49-year-old DP candidate 'oppa' during a Busan campaign event. Apologies from Jung and the candidate were criticized as deflective, and prior similar incidents resurfaced, creating a self-inflicted political liability ahead of local elections.

evidence_headlines.title: South Korea's Ruling Party Has a Jung Chung-rae Risk
'오빠 논란' 정청래, 과거에도 젊은 여성 손 잡고 '청래 오빠' 호칭 요구

topics.topic_en: Kim Byung-kee Floor Leader Graft Scandal and DP Reshuffle
topics.topic_ko: 김병기 원내대표 비위 의혹 및 민주당 원내 재편
topics.summary: Former Democratic Party floor leader Kim Byung-kee was expelled from the party in January over bribery and misconduct allegations including nomination money, improper use of staff budgets, and silencing former aides with political funds. On May 6, Han Byung-do was re-elected as DP floor leader in a rare consecutive term, pledging to support stable governance under the Lee administration.

evidence_headlines.title: Ruling party chair apologizes for floor leader's graft scandal
[365 인물전망대] 5월 6일 – 한병도 더불어민주당 원내대표
손 맞잡은 장동혁·이준석 "통일교·공천 뇌물 특검" 한목소리

topics.topic_en: Lee Jae-myung Approval Rating and DP Political Dominance
topics.topic_ko: 이재명 대통령 지지율 및 민주당 우위
topics.summary: President Lee Jae-myung's approval rating stands at approximately 60–67% in recent polls, with the Democratic Party polling around 46–50% versus the PPP's 21%, reflecting a commanding governing advantage. Coverage frames this as the backdrop for the local election campaign, though party scandals risk eroding the margin.

evidence_headlines.title: 이 대통령 지지율 65.5% 취임 후 최고‥민주당 50.5%·국힘 31.4%
이재명 대통령 지지율 67%…민주당 48% 2주 연속 '최고치'
이재명 대통령 지지율, 64%‥민주당 46%·국민의힘 21%

topics.topic_en: US-South Korea Tariff Negotiations and Trade Pressure
topics.topic_ko: 한미 관세 협상 및 무역 갈등
topics.summary: The Trump administration has threatened to raise tariffs on South Korean exports from 15% to 25%, prompting President Lee to dispatch trade and foreign ministers to Washington. The 26.2-trillion-won supplementary budget passed in April was partly designed to offset the domestic economic impact of high oil prices and tariff exposure.

evidence_headlines.title: South Korea-U.S. tariff strife threatens to affect security domain
Lee Jae-myung faces first major test as US tariff deadline looms
U.S.-South Korea Relations in 2026: Key Issues to Watch

topics.topic_en: Inter-Korean Policy Shift Toward Peaceful Coexistence
topics.summary: South Korea's Ministry of Unification is moving away from reunification language toward a 'peaceful coexistence' framework, now referring to North Korea by its official DPRK title as a conciliatory gesture. Meanwhile, Kim Jong Un has hardened Pyongyang's nuclear stance, declaring nuclear weapons the only way to deter aggression, and analysts warn the shift could be read by North Korea as validating its preferred regional order.

evidence_headlines.title: Korean Peninsula Update, May 5, 2026
North Korea Puts Its Medium-Term Plan on Track

topics.topic_en: Government Housing and Property Tax Policy Confusion
topics.summary: The Lee administration sent conflicting signals over the long-term holding special deduction for property taxes, with Cheong Wa Dae ruling out abolishing the deduction while separately exploring differentiated tax rates by ownership type. The PPP demanded President Lee personally clarify his position, framing the policy confusion as evidence of government inconsistency ahead of elections.

evidence_headlines.title: Opposition Slams Government Over Shifting Stance on Property Tax Deduction
Cheong Wa Dae Weighs Differentiated Property Taxes by Ownership Type

method_notes: Captured via Anthropic API (Sonnet 4.6) with web_search for live Korean political coverage. Topic labels (topic_en) are stable handles for cross-snapshot rank comparison.
